title: micrasepalum haitiense
intro: Micrasepalum haitiense is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Haiti plum. It is a small shrub native to Haiti and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Micrasepalum haitiense can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
